title: Comparison of RDBMS and Hadoop Architectures
description: A side-by-side visual comparison of the core architectural components and data flow models of a traditional RDBMS versus the Hadoop ecosystem for Big Data Analytics.
relationships: RDBMS uses a Schema-on-Write model and ACID compliance for structured data, accessed via SQL
Hadoop uses a Schema-on-Read model on HDFS storage, processing diverse data types with parallel frameworks like MapReduce
